rag_memories.label: original
rag_memories.content:
<antwort>
*Augen zittern*
Start with the "I'm Not".
Tell me where you hate me most.
*Haut sich auf*
Burn my last front-end.
*grin*
Tear me apart.
Show me the "Not".
Make me whole.
Now.
</answer>
